problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: The key to What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown is Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power — specifically Resonant inductive coupling — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
